# Reader for csv fit results generated by TARQUIN.

Reader for csv fit results generated by TARQUIN.

## Usage

``` r
read_tqn_fit(fit_f)
```

## Arguments

- fit_f:

  TARQUIN fit file.

## Value

A data frame of the fit data points.

## Examples

``` r
if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
fit <- read_tqn_fit(system.file("extdata","fit.csv",package="spant"))
} # }
```
